title: Junior SEO Specialist at Puma India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Puma India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Puma India! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Puma India:
Puma India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India!
